stemHtml: What advantage do gridded forecasts offer over traditional forecast?

options.a: Gridded forecasts show more details for an aerodrome than a traditional forecast such as a TAF.
options.b: Pilots can obtain updated forecasts for individual grid areas from Air Traffic Control by radio.
options.c: The forecast can be displayed in a way to aid in visualising flight hazards such as turbulence.
options.d: The forecast can be made available at short notice to aid last minute pre-flight planning.
